name: Atlas Leefomgeving (Living Environment Atlas)
dataType: Air quality, noise, soil quality, water quality, green spaces, living environment indicators
description: Interactive environmental health atlas combining maps of air quality, noise, soil, water and green spaces at neighbourhood level, jointly operated by Rijkswaterstaat and RIVM.

name: RIVM Open Data & Geodata Services
operator: National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)
dataType: Air quality (NSL), emission registers, noise contours, nitrogen deposition, health per neighbourhood
description: RIVM's open data portal and GeoServer-based geodata services providing emission registrations, air quality models, noise maps, nitrogen deposition and public health statistics.

name: PDOK Key Registers & TOP10NL APIs
dataType: TOP10NL topographic vectors, BAG addresses/buildings, BRK cadastral parcels, BGT large-scale topography
apiProtocol: OGC API Features, OGC API Tiles, WMS, WFS, REST
description: Unified API gateway for all Dutch key registers including TOP10NL topographic data, BAG addresses and buildings, BRK cadastral parcels and BGT large-scale topography.

name: Deltares BlueEarth Data
dataType: Wave height, water level, discharge, wave climate, coastal erosion, bathymetry, meteorological data
description: Deltares open-access data platform providing global water-related and subsoil-related data including wave climate, water levels, discharge and coastal erosion datasets.

name: Brussels UrbIS (datastore.brussels)
dataType: Street network, addresses, parcels, buildings, administrative boundaries, green spaces, transport
description: Brussels-Capital Region urban geographic database providing detailed street network, address, building and parcel data through the Datastore open data portal.

name: VMM Waterinfo.be (Flanders Water Portal)
dataType: Water levels, discharge, rainfall, water quality (acidity, oxygen, turbidity, salinity), tidal data
description: Real-time and historical water data portal for Flanders providing water levels, discharge, rainfall and water quality from VMM and Flanders Hydraulics Research via the KIWIS API.

name: FOEN/BAFU Geodata (Federal Office for the Environment)
dataType: Biodiversity inventories, water protection zones, natural hazards, noise, forest, soil, air quality, landscape
description: Swiss federal environmental geodata covering biodiversity, water, natural hazards, noise, forest and soil, viewable on map.geo.admin.ch and downloadable from opendata.swiss.

name: NABEL Air Quality Monitoring Network
dataType: NO2, O3, PM10, PM2.5, SO2, CO, VOC, heavy metals, PAH at 16 stations
spatialResolution: point (16 stations: urban, suburban, rural, alpine)
description: Swiss national air pollution monitoring network operated jointly by FOEN and Empa with 16 stations measuring criteria pollutants at urban, suburban, rural and alpine sites since 1981.

name: Swiss Data Cube (SDC)
dataType: Analysis-ready Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat 5/7/8 imagery over Switzerland
description: Cloud-based analysis-ready data archive of optical and radar satellite imagery over Switzerland since 1984, supporting environmental monitoring and land cover change analysis.

name: map.geo.admin.ch (Swiss Federal Geoportal)
dataType: 600+ layers: topography, geology, environment, transport, energy, agriculture, natural hazards
description: Swiss federal map viewer and API gateway providing access to over 600 geospatial layers from all federal offices including FOEN, swisstopo and BFS.

name: Administration de la Nature et des Forêts (ANF) Open Data
operator: Administration de la Nature et des Forêts (ANF)
dataType: Biotope cadastre, Natura 2000 sites, forest inventory, protected areas, habitat maps
description: Luxembourg's Nature and Forest Agency open datasets including the biotope cadastre, Natura 2000 site boundaries, forest inventory and protected area designations.

name: Rijkswaterstaat Waterdata (DDL / MATROOS)
dataType: Water levels, wave heights, currents, salinity, temperature, chlorophyll, nutrients (DDL bulk access)
description: Rijkswaterstaat programmatic web services (Distributie Laag / MATROOS) for bulk download and real-time access to water level, wave, current and water quality data from Dutch state waters.

name: VMM Air Quality Monitoring (Luchtkwaliteit)
dataType: PM10, PM2.5, NO2, O3, SO2, black carbon, benzo(a)pyrene from telemetric network
description: Flemish Environment Agency air quality monitoring data from approximately 60 telemetric stations measuring criteria pollutants in real-time across Flanders.
